top_signals.title: Several BP shareholders found ousted chair ‘challenging’
top_signals.summary: Several large investors say it was hard to arrange meetings with Albert Manifold before his removal from oil major
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Daniel Boulud Celebrates Le Pavillon 5th Anniversary, Demand for Dining
top_signals.summary: Daniel Boulud, Chef and Restauranter at Dinex Group, discusses the state of the restaurant industry, food inflation, and upcoming projects including the opening of Brasserie Boulud later this year in New York City. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Infighting, court battles could put long-hyped air taxi breakthrough in jeopardy
top_signals.summary: Trump's eVTOL pilot program is giving the air taxi industry its validation, but legal battles have put investor sentiment on hold.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Don’t bet on Trump reining in the prediction markets
top_signals.summary: The sector is expanding at breakneck speed in the US

top_signals.title: US charges Google security engineer with Polymarket insider trading
top_signals.summary: A Google security engineer was charged with insider trading after winning $1.2 million using confidential company data to place bets on the cryptocurrency-based Polymarket decentralized prediction market. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Bechtel Secures EPC Contract for Sabine Pass LNG Expansion
top_signals.summary: Cheniere Energy Partners has signed a lump-sum turnkey engineering, procurement and construction (EPC) contract with Bechtel Energy for the first phase of the Sabine Pass LNG Expansion Project in Louisiana and issued a limited notice to proceed…
